channel.title: scala on kuba86 - Scala Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in scala on kuba86 - Scala Engineer

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: Hello World This is a test page Code block with backticks Tip Remember to write code and not simply copy and paste! 😉 import scala.util.Random case class Person(name: String, age: Int) { val greet: String = s"Hi $name:-)" } val jacob: Person = Person("Jacob", 35) jacob.greet
